architecture_fit.note: Single attention head, no MLP, hand-set W_Q/W_K — the minimal delta from base_model.py; logit_i = -beta*value_i nails argmin (sharpness 63.99/64).

baseline_comparison.note: Uniform strawman (sharpness 1.0, accuracy 0.0) measured on the identical batch; canonical lift of +62.99 is decisive.

faithfulness.note: Beta sweep is direct ablation: beta=0 collapses the head exactly to uniform and raising beta monotonically sharpens — knocking out the -beta*value channel destroys the behaviour.

operating_range.note: Gap swept 0.05–2.0 (~1.6 orders) and beta 0–32; degradation at small gaps shown explicitly (worst-slice sharpness 38.96, robustness 0.61), no silent failure.

hardcoded_weights_bonus.note: Entire mechanism is hand-set by construction, not trained — an exact circuit written out by hand.

visual_judgement.note: Per-position attention bar plot (argmin red, runner-up orange, uniform 1/64 dashed) plus sharpness-vs-beta curve make the concentration and its causal driver legible at a glance.

visualisation_rationale.note: Why-this-viz ties the bar's uniform reference and the beta curve (sharpness = attn@min*64, the headline metric) directly to the goal's question and baseline.

notes: A textbook hand-built interpretability result: a single MLP-free attention head with hand-set Q/K augmenting the key with the scalar value and pointing the query at it with weight -beta, giving logit_i = -beta*value_i and near-perfect argmin concentration (63.99/64). The beta=0 ablation collapsing exactly to the uniform strawman provides clean causal evidence, the gap sweep documents where it degrades, and the two-panel demo makes both the concentration and its driver legible. Every rubric item is fully met.
